description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 24, 2025 at 2:37 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Bayshore Boulevard at the intersection with Jerrold Avenue and the off-ramp freeway exit 432 of 
US-101 North.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on Bayshore Boulevard and proceeding straight at the intersection with Jerrold Avenue and the 
off-ramp freeway exit 432 of US-101 North. The ADV slowed down to a stop while entering the intersection after detecting a collision with 
a bird in flight. As the Waymo AV remained stationary, a passenger car traveling directly behind the Waymo AV approached the Waymo 
AV from behind and the front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the 
Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV and the passenger car sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
